title: Tech Workers United: Statement on GlobalTech Workforce Changes
snippet: Tech Workers United condemns GlobalTech restructuring affecting 1,200 workers amid record profits.
content: PRESS STATEMENT — Tech Workers United condemns GlobalTech Corporation's decision to restructure 1,200 positions while the company reports record revenue of $14.2 billion. Regardless of how it is framed, the action displaces workers and creates uncertainty.
